name: Weather Tool
description: Weather-only tool for forecast lookup, rain probability, temperature, and umbrella advice.

name: Travel Tool
description: Travel-only tool for flights, trains, hotels, destinations, and ticket booking. Not for weather, finance, writing, or calendar tasks.

name: Calculation Tool
description: Numeric-only tool for arithmetic, percentages, tips, and unit conversion. Not for planning, scheduling, or general advice.

name: Document Tool
description: Text-only tool for summarizing, rewriting, extracting points, and editing notes, emails, or documents. Not for weather, booking, finance, calendar, or numeric tasks.

name: Finance Tool
description: Finance-only tool for stock prices, crypto prices, market performance, and closing values.

name: Calendar Tool
description: Calendar-only tool for alarms, meetings, appointment moves, and event scheduling.
